input.command:
cat > bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md << 'EOF'
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts
- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and exports the TypeScript Router, SmartRouter, and TrieRouter.
- Names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, Schema, Env
- Simple note: Imports and re-exports router implementations for public use.

## src/hono-base.ts
- Purpose: Abstract base class that implements the core request handling logic without a router, providing composition and middleware support.
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, getPath, mergePath, compose, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, basePaths, mount, handle, request, fetch, onError, notFound, onError, all, route, router, clone, getPath, match
- Simple note: Core application logic for matching routes and executing handlers via a router.

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Entry point for the pattern router module, exporting the PatternRouter class.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports the PatternRouter implementation.

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Implements a pattern-based router using regex patterns and wildcards, supporting methods like GET, POST, and others.
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, UnsupportedPathError, METHOD_NAME_ALL, routeMethod, pattern, handlers, matches, exec
- Simple note: Builds regex patterns from route paths and matches incoming requests against them.

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Entry point for the linear router module, exporting the LinearRouter class.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports the LinearRouter implementation.

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Implements a linear router that processes routes in order by building matchers for each segment and handling wildcards and regex patterns.
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, checkOptionalParameter, routeMethod, routePath, handlers, matches, indexOf, splitByStarRe, splitPathRe, paramCount, openBracePos, lookahead, paramAssocMap
- Simple note: Matches requests sequentially by parsing path segments and regex patterns with wildcard support.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
- Purpose: Entry point for the regular expression router module, exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
- Simple note: Re-exports main router classes and preparation utilities.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
- Purpose: Core implementation of a regex-based router using trie structure, building matchers and static maps for method-specific matching.
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, Trie, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, matchers, buildAllMatchers, clearRoutes, staticMap, handle, route, param, match, all
- Simple note: Constructs regex patterns and static maps from routes, matching methods against pre-built structures.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
- Purpose: Defines matcher types and the core match function that resolves requests using regex patterns and static maps.
- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match, PARAM_INDEX, route, handlers, map, exec, indices, indexOf
- Simple note: Type definitions and core matching logic using pre-built regex patterns.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
- Purpose: Provides prepared regex matching with relocation mapping for efficient route resolution and serialized configuration generation.
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RegExpRouterWithMatcherExport, matchers, relocateMap, indexReplacementMap, all, staticMap, matcher, method, METHOD_NAME_ALL
- Simple note: Optimized router with build-time map generation for faster runtime matching.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
- Purpose: Defines the Trie node structure for regex router, storing children, patterns, params, and handling route tokenization.
- Names noticed: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, token, pattern, children, methods, params, patterns, patternIndex, pattern, regex, key
- Simple note: Node structure for trie-based pattern matching with token tracking and parameter association.

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
- Purpose: Implements the Trie data structure that builds regex replacements and maps for pattern matching from route tokens.
